name: not_order_ev_pfirst_upd
drl: rule R when not E0() P() then end
_finding: D-143 item 1b Family B: P2 (initial, segment 0) UPDATED in a LATER segment (after the blocker) re-stages into that segment, firing with P3's batch BEFORE the untouched initial P1: [3,2,1]. A same-segment update would NOT move it. Isolates the update re-staging rule.
